name: order_priority_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts order-priority class from correlated features such as total price, ship priority, and order month.
comment: Kept as a proxy-label benchmark to measure how much order metadata alone can predict priority classes, even though the target is not directly defined by these inputs.
target_expression: CASE o_orderpriority WHEN '1-URGENT' THEN 0 WHEN '2-HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN '3-MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN '4-NOT SPECIFIED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
